title.zh: 等待每日 AI 生成靈修

scripture.rcuv: 「我是葡萄樹，你們是枝子……因為離了我，你們就不能做甚麼。」
scripture.esv: “I am the vine; you are the branches… apart from me you can do nothing.”

meditation.zh: 這是安裝後的預設範例。當你在 GitHub repository 設定 OPENAI_API_KEY，並執行 GitHub Actions 後，這裡會自動替換成每天新生成的靈修內容。
meditation.en: This is the default sample. After you set OPENAI_API_KEY in your GitHub repository and run GitHub Actions, this will be replaced by a newly generated daily devotion.

practice.zh: 今天先確認 GitHub Actions 已成功執行。
practice.en: Today, first confirm that GitHub Actions has run successfully.

prayer.zh: 主耶穌，求你使用這個工具，使我每日在你的話中被更新。阿們。
prayer.en: Lord Jesus, use this tool to renew me daily in Your Word. Amen.

hymn.relation_zh: 這首詩歌適合作為每日轉向主的起點。
hymn.relation_en: This hymn is a fitting starting point for turning to the Lord each day.

sentence.zh: 每日靈修不是完成任務，而是轉向基督。
sentence.en: Daily devotion is not merely completing a task, but turning to Christ.
